title: Staff identity foundation: seed a system staff_profile + fix actor resolution to the real schema (unblocks staff_owner_id and all actor-stamping)
requested_by: engineering (root-caused from the CRM comms staff_owner_id NOT-NULL error)
business_reason: Recording a CRM interaction failed with: null value in column staff_owner_id violates not-null constraint. Root cause (systematic-debugging): not signed in -> resolveStaffActor returns DEV_STAFF with actor_id 'dev-super-admin' (NOT a UUID); actorId() returns null; staff_owner_id is uuid NOT NULL FK -> staff_profiles(id). The same gap silently affects every actor-stamped column (created_by/uploaded_by/lead_owner_id/approvers). Additionally resolveStaffActor reads columns that do not exist (profile.status/roles/scopes) while the table has staff_status/primary_role+secondary_roles and scopes live in staff_assignment_scopes — so even real sign-in resolves with empty roles/scopes. And no staff_profiles row is seeded, so the FK target is absent.

root_cause.investigation: Phase 1-2 of systematic-debugging. Traced staff_owner_id=actorId(actor)=null back to DEV_STAFF.actor_id being a non-UUID; verified staff_owner_id is uuid NOT NULL FK (migration 0001:1835/2957); verified staff_profiles real columns (staff_status, primary_role, secondary_roles; no scopes; auth_user_id added in 0002) vs the columns resolveStaffActor reads; verified no staff_profiles seed.
root_cause.not_a_symptom_fix: Making staff_owner_id nullable was rejected — an interaction has a human owner; the real fix is a valid staff identity.

param_14.question: Provide a real staff identity so actor-stamped columns (staff_owner_id, etc.) resolve to a valid staff_profiles UUID, in dev and on real sign-in.
param_14.answer: (1) Seed an idempotent SYSTEM staff_profile with a FIXED uuid (00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001), staff_status active, primary_role super_admin, department system, employment_type system_service. (2) Point the dev-fallback actor at that uuid so actorId() returns an FK-valid id. (3) Fix resolveStaffActor to the real schema: roles = primary_role + secondary_roles; active = staff_status==='active'; scopes loaded from staff_assignment_scopes (scope_type:scope_value, state->region, work_queue->queue), active only. Global roles still resolve as global via isGlobalActor.
param_14.data_entities: staff_profiles (seed system row), staff_assignment_scopes (read for scopes)
param_14.security_implications: Roles/scopes are still loaded server-side from the DB, never trusted from the browser (unchanged). The dev fallback remains gated by devAuthAllowed() (local or ALLOW_DEV_AUTH; never in production). The seeded system identity is a service account (system_service) for system/seed-stamped writes.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: Every actor-stamped FK now has a valid target in dev. Full staff CRUD / role-assignment UI / Supabase sign-in flow remain a separate larger effort (not in this CR).
param_14.assumptions: The dev fallback actor maps to the seeded SYSTEM profile. Real sign-in maps auth_user_id -> staff_profiles; assignment scopes come from staff_assignment_scopes.

principles_pass.no_symptom_fix: systematic-debugging — fix the identity (root), not staff_owner_id nullability (symptom)
principles_pass.server_trust: P3.8/P3.9 — roles/scopes loaded server-side from DB; never from client
principles_pass.real_schema: P2.1 — read the actual columns (staff_status/primary_role/secondary_roles) + the real scope source (staff_assignment_scopes)
principles_pass.idempotent_seed: migration insert is ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING (safe to re-run)
principles_pass.dev_gating: dev fallback stays behind devAuthAllowed() — never production

functional: scopes mapped from assignments (school/region/olympiad/queue; state->region; work_queue->queue; global)
DEV/system actor_id is a valid UUID (actorId returns it)
security_owasp: A01/A07: a non-active or missing profile resolves to null (fail-closed)
client-supplied roles/scopes are ignored (only DB values used)
